info.name: Meridian Platform API - Full Current Endpoint Test Collection
info.description:
JWT/RBAC Postman collection for all currently implemented Meridian backend endpoints.

Recommended run order:
1. Run the Auth folder to capture role-specific Bearer tokens.
2. Run Public and Partner Admin requests.
3. Run Customer Employee Verification, then Salary Advance Application.
4. Run Loan Officer Review and Recommendation.

The Salary Advance happy path is duplicate-sensitive because the authenticated demo customer can have only one active Salary Advance application. Run it on a fresh local database, or reset test data before repeating the full happy-path flow.

variable.description: Fictional local demo password for seeded Meridian users only.
